/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_qcap2_muxer.dir/tests/test_qcap2_muxer.cpp.o -o test_qcap2_muxer  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/lib" lib/libqcap2.muxer.so lib/libqcap2.processing.so lib/libqcap2.devices.so lib/libqcap2.sync.so lib/libqcap2.formats.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswscale.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavfilter.so lib/libqcap2.buffer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavformat.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so
